ph_01_scope.rationale: Single feat commit. Two HDs (HD-005 + HD-002) bundled but coupled by depends_on: HD-002 depends on HD-005's protocol seam. Documented in HD-002 frontmatter. The bundling is justified — HD-002 cannot be written before HD-005 lands.

ph_02_size.rationale: 1974 line change is in the 1001-3000 medium band. File count (9) well within threshold. Substantive split breakdown: HD-005 ~342 lines in _wpxlib.py (net) + 192 line unit-test = ~534 lines for HD-005. HD-002 = ~778 testbed + 274 test + 23 conftest = ~1075. Marketplace + plugin bumps + HD docs = ~365. Split into two PRs would have been ~534 (HD-005, including its unit tests) and ~1075 (HD-002, which depends on HD-005 landing first). Splitting would have created a stronger gate between protocol introduction and consumption — but the trade-off is real and the deltas' depends_on chain makes the bundling defensible.

ph_03_safety.rationale: Pure source + test changes. No migrations, schemas, infra, or secrets.

ph_04_completeness.rationale: HD-005 added a Protocol + adapter with 11 dedicated unit tests; HD-002 IS test infrastructure with 9 integration tests exercising it. Completeness is exceptional for this PR.

auto_downgrade_trigger: none — PH-03 severity note, not high
